Interface VaccineTypeCatalogService

All Known Implementing Classes:
VaccineTypeCatalogServiceImpl
public interface VaccineTypeCatalogService
Manages the catalog of vaccine types available in the system, supporting full CRUD operations. Each vaccine type is uniquely identified by its ID; name is used for lookup convenience but may be updated.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(VaccineType vaccineType)
    Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog.
    VaccineType
    findById(String id)
    Returns the vaccine type with the given ID.
    VaccineType
    findByName(String name)
    Returns the vaccine type with the given name.
    List<VaccineType>
    listAll()
    Returns all vaccine types currently in the catalog.
    void
    remove(String id)
    Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID.
    void
    update(VaccineType vaccineType)
    Updates an existing vaccine type in the catalog.

  • Method Details

    • add

      void add(VaccineType vaccineType)
      Adds a new vaccine type to the catalog. Throws an exception if a vaccine type with the same name already exists.
      Parameters:
      vaccineType - the vaccine type to add

    • update

      void update(VaccineType vaccineType)
      Updates an existing vaccine type in the catalog. The vaccine type is identified by its ID; all mutable fields are replaced with those of the given object. Throws an exception if the vaccine type is not found.
      Parameters:
      vaccineType - the vaccine type with updated information

    • remove

      void remove(String id)
      Removes a vaccine type from the catalog by ID. Throws an exception if no vaccine type with that ID is found.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the vaccine type to remove

    • findById

      VaccineType findById(String id)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given ID. Throws an exception if no matching vaccine type is found.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID to look up
      Returns:
      the matching vaccine type

    • findByName

      VaccineType findByName(String name)
      Returns the vaccine type with the given name. Throws an exception if no matching vaccine type is found.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to look up
      Returns:
      the matching vaccine type

    • listAll

      List<VaccineType> listAll()
      Returns all vaccine types currently in the catalog. Returns an empty list if the catalog is empty.
      Returns:
      a list of all vaccine types
